account_locked.suspended: This account has been locked. Reset your password or contact support to regain access.
account_locked.temporary: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.

email.already_verified: This email address has already been verified.
email.verification_expired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one.
email.verification_invalid: This verification link is invalid. Request a new one.

email_verification.already_verified: This email address has already been verified.
email_verification.subject: Verify your {app} email address
email_verification.verification_expired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one.
email_verification.verification_invalid: This verification link is invalid. Request a new one.

auth.wrong_spa: This account is registered for the admin console. Please sign in there instead.

login.account_locked: This account has been locked. Reset your password or contact support to regain access.
login.account_locked_temporary: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
login.mfa_required: Multi-factor authentication is required to complete sign-in.
login.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.
login.wrong_spa: This account is not registered for this site. Please sign in on the correct site.

auth.mfa_required: Multi-factor authentication is required to complete sign-in.

mfa.already_enabled: Divfaktoru autentifikācija is already enabled for this account.
mfa.enrollment_required: Divfaktoru autentifikācija must be enabled before you can continue.
mfa.enrollment_suspended: Divfaktoru autentifikācija has been suspended for this account. Please contact support to restore access.
mfa.invalid_code: The two-factor code is invalid. Please try again.
mfa.not_enabled: Divfaktoru autentifikācija is not enabled for this account.
mfa.provisional_expired: The two-factor enrollment session has expired. Please start again.
mfa.rate_limited: Too many invalid two-factor attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.

password.breached: This password appears in known data breaches and cannot be used. Please choose a different one.
password.invalid_token: This password-reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
password.invalid_type: The password must be a string.
password.too_long: The password must not exceed {max} characters.
password.too_short: The password must be at least {min} characters.

reset.invalid_token: This password-reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.subject: Reset your {app} password

signup.email_taken: An account with this email address already exists.

descriptions.valid_pending: {agency} has invited you to join their roster. Turpināt below to create your account.
descriptions.already_accepted: Pierakstīties with the account you created when you first accepted this invitation.
descriptions.expired: Contact {agency} to send you a new invitation link.
descriptions.invalid: This invitation link is no longer valid. Try a different link, or contact the inviting agency for a fresh one.

banners.completing_invitation: You're completing an agency invitation. Use the email address the invitation was sent to.

banners.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
banners.verification_email_sent: We've sent a verification email. Check your inbox to complete sign-up.
banners.reset_link_sent: If an account exists for that email, a password-reset link is on its way.
banners.email_verified: Your email is verified. You can sign in.
banners.password_reset_done: Your password has been reset. You can sign in.

hero.headline: Izveidot UGC ads for the world's best brands.
hero.body: Reģistrēties to work with some of the world's biggest brands — signing up once means you could work with brands like Perplexity, Lovable, Bolt, Hims and more.
hero.footnote: Unsure if it's for you? Check out some of our case studies below.

descriptions.verify_email_pending: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Open it to finish setting up your account.
descriptions.forgot_password: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
descriptions.enable_2fa_intro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the manual key. Then confirm by entering the six-digit code.
descriptions.auth_bootstrap_error: We could not load your account information. Check your connection and try again.
descriptions.recovery_codes_warning: Saglabāt these one-time codes somewhere safe. They are your only way to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator.

errors.network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.missing_token: This link is missing required information.

rate_limit.exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.

invitation.not_found: This invitation link is no longer valid. Try a different link, or contact the inviting agency.
invitation.expired: This invitation has expired. Contact the agency to send you a new one.
invitation.already_accepted: This invitation was already accepted. Pierakstīties with the account you created.
invitation.email_mismatch: This invitation is bound to a different email address. Use the email the invitation was sent to, or contact the agency.
